author: y4rr
content: Decision: Switch the python reference for encode/decode from transformers.AutoTokenizer to tokenizers.Tokenizer (loaded from the same tokenizer.json the rust side reads). transformers post-processing (clean_up_tokenization_spaces, slow-tokenizer CLIP decoder) is a transformers concern that the rust crate does not implement and shouldn't claim to match. Keep transformers.AutoTokenizer for apply_chat_template only, since the chat template is a transformers concept (not a tokenizers concept) and the rust side renders the SAME Jinja template via minijinja — exact-match on the rendered string is the right contract there.
